title: PlayerTracker
description:
显示其它玩家与你的距离。
Display the distance between other players and you.
body:
该mod会在右上角加HUD，显示目前追踪的目标和距离。
请注意，这是一个客户端mod，当玩家和玩家之间超过一定距离将无法被检测到！
**注意！！请不要在公共服务器上使用这个mod作弊，可能会被封禁！这只是用来和朋友玩的！**

This mod adds a HUD in the top-right corner, displaying the current target being tracked and the distance.
Please note that this is a client-side mod, and players will not be detected when they are beyond a certain distance from each other!
**Note!! Please do not use this mod to cheat on public servers; you may get banned!
 It's only for playing with friends!**
